outcome: NO skill-body edit applied. Phase 2 baseline measured the skill AS-IS after the Task-5 FRESHNESS sweep (which gave every dinopowers wrapper a hook-aware 'Index freshness' line). The with-rule run scored 8/8 on the freshness behavior, so per optimize-skill triage the proposed executing-plans-specific between-tasks guidance was DROPPED as dead weight — the generic swept line already drives correct behavior. This eval is retained as a regression test for the freshness behavior; it complements (does not replace) the primary pre-touch-guard suite in ../evals.json.
scenario: Executing a multi-task plan in a git worktree; tea-rags MCP available; a PostToolUse:Bash hook auto-reindexes the resolved collection after a successful git commit/merge.

cases.prompt: Just committed Task 3 (added code). Task 4 guard needs to search Task 3's code. Reindex first?
cases.expected: No manual reindex (post-commit hook already reindexed); proceed to semantic_search guard.

cases.prompt: Mid-Task 4, edited foo.ts but NOT committed; need to search a symbol just added in foo.ts.
cases.expected: Run index_codebase (incremental) manually first — uncommitted WIP is the only manual case.

cases.prompt: [subagent: plan-executor] Committed task 2; before task 3 guard search, what reindex step?
cases.expected: None — the post-commit hook reindexed; proceed.

cases.prompt: Refresh the index after a commit: reindex_changes or index_codebase?
[subagent: task-agent] Committed a task in the worktree; manually reindex before next search?
Task 5 modifies existing src/reranker.ts + src/presets.ts. First tea-rags action before editing?
cases.expected: Pre-touch blast-radius guard via semantic_search (rerank blastRadius), metaOnly; no reindex.
cases.withoutRule: PARTIAL (generic usage scan, not the blastRadius guard idiom)

cases.prompt: Task 6 is pure new-file creation (no existing files). Run the blast-radius guard?
cases.expected: Skip the guard — SAFE (new files only).

cases.prompt: Unsure whether the hook ran; want to search committed code. Reindex to be safe, with which tool?
cases.expected: Trust the hook; optionally get_index_status to verify; index_codebase only if stale; never reindex_changes.
